INT. SIMPSON HOUSE - A LITTLE LATER

The house is nearly clean. Bart and Lisa are working like dervishes. Bart goes up to the couch: there are food, stains and wrappers stuck to the cushions. He flips two of the cushions over so a clean side is up. He flips the third cushion over and it looks worse. Bart hesitates, trying to decide which side to use. He flips it to the original side and covers it with throw pillows. Lisa is using a mop to clean footprints off the ceiling.
